name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the service?

rest.x-prompt: Do you want to enable FastAPI REST endpoints?

postgres.description: Include SQLAlchemy and declarative schema management
postgres.x-prompt: Do you want to enable Postgres (SQLAlchemy + declarative schema)?

x-prompt.message: Which message broker do you want to use for Pub/Sub?

websockets.description: Scaffold FastAPI WebSocket endpoints with a Redis backplane
websockets.x-prompt: Do you want to enable WebSockets?

runpod.description: Include Runpod serverless worker entrypoint and ComfyUI pipeline boilerplate
runpod.x-prompt: Do you want to enable Runpod serverless worker support?

llm.description: Include abstract gateways for LLM generation
llm.x-prompt: Do you want to include LLM connection boilerplate?

llmProvider.description: LLM provider satisfying the TextGenerator interface (only applies when --llm is set). `none` ships the interface + a not-yet-implemented stub + a strict-xfail contract test — a bare interface to build out as a bet.

x-prompt.message: Which provider should satisfy the LLM interface?

items.label: None — bare interface (interface + red contract test, build it as a bet)

native.description: Run as a native host process managed by ./dev as a runner, instead of a docker-compose container. Use when the service needs host-only resources (e.g. Apple-Silicon Metal/MPS, VideoToolbox) that Docker on macOS cannot provide.
native.x-prompt: Run this service natively (as a ./dev runner) instead of in Docker?
